description: Sets a control's value programmatically. Works with dropdown, inputstepper, and inputnumber controls. Can be used standalone or nested inside playinputaction and playinputanimator as a value assignment before replay/animation.
utility: Set a control's value programmatically during playback

arguments.name: targetRef
arguments.description: Reference to a dropdown, stepper, or inputnumber control

alternates.description: Set dropdown to a symbolic/string value
Nested inside playinputaction to set value before command replay
Nested inside playinputanimator to animate from current to new value

examples.expression:
n = 1
drop_1 = dropdown(at(3, 4), "n", value(1, 2, 3, 4, 5), display("n"), type(number), ref(1))
setvalue(drop_1, 3)

number_1 = inputnumber(at(5, 16), "a", value(20), size(4), display("A"))
playinputaction(at(4, 6), setvalue(number_1, 10), primefactor_1, type(sequence), display("Play"))

a = 1
f = plot(G, "a*x^2")
btn_1 = playinputanimator(at(6, 16), setvalue(a, 10), t(6), display("Animate"))
